consit.about: A reserved constituency bordering the Union Territory of Puducherry. It is a mix of coastal hamlets and dry-land farming, primarily known for cashew and groundnut cultivation and the presence of the international township Auroville.

problem.title: Illegal Sand Mining
problem.desc: Widespread illegal sand quarrying in the riverbeds of the Varahanadi has led to a drastic drop in the water table, causing cashew trees to wither in 2026.

problem.title: Auroville Buffer Zone Conflict
problem.desc: Local villagers are in a standoff with township authorities over land acquisition for the 'Crown Road' project, which threatens ancestral housing.

problem.title: Cashew Processing Crisis
problem.desc: The absence of a government-run cashew processing plant forces farmers to sell raw nuts at low prices to private agents in Panruti.

problem.title: Coastal Sea Erosion
problem.desc: Villages like Bommayarpalayam are losing houses to the rising sea; the demand for a permanent groyne or sea-wall remains unaddressed.

problem.title: Lack of PHC Night Staff
problem.desc: Primary Health Centers in the block lack doctors after 5 PM, requiring patients to travel to JIPMER (Puducherry) for even minor emergencies.

consit.about: The district headquarters and a major railway junction. It is a dense urban center that serves as the administrative and commercial heart of the region, balancing trade with a large student population.

problem.title: Flyover Traffic Bottle-necks
problem.desc: The narrow exit points of the main flyovers create permanent gridlock near the old bus stand, especially during peak school and office hours.

problem.title: Underground Drainage (UGD) Failure
problem.desc: The existing UGD system frequently chokes in the old town wards, causing sewage to stagnate in residential streets for days.

problem.title: Garbage Yard Pollution
problem.desc: The municipal dump site near residential areas is prone to frequent fires, leading to severe air pollution and respiratory issues for locals in 2026.

problem.title: Railway Station Parking
problem.desc: Inadequate parking at the Villupuram junction forces travelers to leave vehicles on the main road, leading to constant police fines and theft risks.

problem.title: Youth Unemployment
problem.desc: Despite being an educational hub, the town lacks any IT or manufacturing industries, forcing graduates to migrate to Chennai for basic service jobs.

consit.about: A key transit constituency located on the Chennai-Trichy National Highway. It is an agrarian belt famous for sugarcane and its strategic location that hosts numerous highway-side commercial establishments.

problem.title: Sugarcane Arrears Crisis
problem.desc: Private sugar mills in the region have failed to clear dues for the 2025-26 season, pushing many farming families into high-interest debt traps.

problem.title: Highway Service Road Lack
problem.desc: Villagers living along the NH-45 face daily danger as they are forced to drive on the wrong side due to the absence of proper service roads.

problem.title: Pollution from Toll Plaza
problem.desc: The high volume of idling trucks at the Vikravandi toll plaza has created a 'micro-pollution zone,' affecting the health of residents in nearby hamlets.

problem.title: Lack of Cold Storage
problem.desc: Vegetable farmers in this belt report 30% wastage during the summer peak as there is no government facility to store surplus harvest.

problem.title: Stagnant SIDCO Project
problem.desc: The proposed industrial estate has seen no development in three years, leaving local vocational students without apprenticeship opportunities.

consit.about: A historic town located on the banks of the Thenpennai River. It is famous for the Ulagalantha Perumal Temple and serves as a major commercial center for the surrounding agrarian villages.

problem.title: Bifurcation Confusion
problem.desc: A unique administrative mess exists where the revenue taluk is in Kallakurichi district but the assembly constituency remains in Villupuram, confusing residents.

problem.title: Thenpennai River Encroachment
problem.desc: Illegal constructions on the riverbed have narrowed the water flow, causing floods in the town's low-lying areas during dam releases.

problem.title: Under-equipped GH
problem.desc: The District Headquarters Hospital here lacks a dedicated trauma care unit, forcing accident victims to be referred to Mundiyampakkam (40km away).

problem.title: Incomplete Bus Stand
problem.desc: The new bus stand project has been stalled due to land disputes, forcing commuters to wait under the sun at a temporary, unhygienic terminal.

problem.title: Girl’s Education Gaps
problem.desc: There is a long-standing demand for a Government Girls Higher Secondary School in the Arakandanallur block to prevent high dropout rates.
